keywords: tier gated query layer filter BuildSearchFilter content access level over-retrieval cursor ceiling 50
ironRules: content_access_level IN accessLevels[] at query layer — never post-filter in application code
Cursor ceiling = 50 — never retrieve unlimited documents for feed seeding
accessLevels[] sourced from T100 output (MembershipActivated payload) — not re-computed
Feed records stored with PRIVATE knowledgeScope (per-user feed)
Query target = xiigen-group-content (GLOBAL index — shared group content)
